description: PerturbTfSiteWithoutSideEffects reports the secondary effects of mutations.
author: Joe Solvasson, modified into a GenePattern module as Ted Liefeld
plan:
## tfsites.PerturbTfSiteWithoutSideEffects GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
tfsites.PerturbTfSiteWithoutSideEffects is a GenePattern module that PerturbTfSiteWithoutSideEffects reports the secondary effects of mutations.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 26 parameters:
- Required: DNA.sequence.to.annotate, primary.TF.name, primary.SNV.effect.type.to.report, affinity.optimization.threshold, affinity.reduction.threshold
- Optional: primary.core.binding.site.definition, primary.affinity.reference.data, primary.PWM.data, primary.PWM.minimum.score, secondary.affinity.information, secondary.affinity.files, secondary.PWM.data, secondary.PWM.minimum.score, secondary.minimum.binding.charge, primary.motif.input.file, primary.motif.input.format, primary.motif.filter.keywords, primary.motif.use.pseudocounts, primary.motif.background.frequencies, primary.motif.output.name, secondary.motif.input.file, secondary.motif.input.format, secondary.motif.filter.keywords, secondary.motif.use.pseudocounts, secondary.motif.background.frequencies, secondary.motif.output.name

### 3. Command Line
```
python /build/tfsites-webportal/07-perturbTfSiteWithoutSideEffects/07-combined-generateMotifDatabase-and-perturbTfSiteWithoutSideEffects.py  -s <DNA.sequence.to.annotate>  -n <primary.TF.name> <primary.affinity.reference.data>  <primary.core.binding.site.definition> <primary.PWM.data>  <primary.PWM.minimum.score>    <primary.SNV.effect.type.to.report> <affinity.optimization.threshold> <affinity.reduction.threshold> <secondary.affinity.information> <secondary.affinity.files> <secondary.PWM.data> <secondary.PWM.minimum.score> <secondary.minimum.binding.charge> -d .  <primary.motif.input.file> <primary.motif.input.format>  <primary.motif.filter.keywords> <primary.motif.use.pseudocounts> <primary.motif.background.frequencies> <primary.motif.output.name>  <secondary.motif.input.file> <secondary.motif.input.format> <secondary.motif.use.pseudocounts> <secondary.motif.filter.keywords>  <secondary.motif.background.frequencies> <secondary.motif.output.name>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/tfsites\:17.1.3

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: DNA.sequence.to.annotate
parameters.description: File containing a DNA sequence to be annotated.

parameters.name: primary.TF.name
parameters.description: Name of the primary transcription factor to use for SNV analysis.

parameters.name: primary.core.binding.site.definition
parameters.description: IUPAC definition of core TF binding site (see here). Only optional if using PWM data but required if using affinity data.

parameters.name: primary.affinity.reference.data
parameters.description: PBM affinity dataset used to assign a value to each binding site.

parameters.name: primary.PWM.data
parameters.description: PWM dataset used to assign a value to each binding site.

parameters.name: primary.PWM.minimum.score
parameters.description: PWM score required to predict a binding site.

parameters.name: primary.SNV.effect.type.to.report
parameters.description: Specify one or more mutation types to analyze. SNV mutations can either increase (optimize) or decrease (sub-optimize) the affinity/score, delete a binding site, or create a binding site. Therefore, the possible mutation types are 'inc', 'dec', 'denovo', and 'del.' This option also takes the value 'all' if the user would like to analyze all of the listed mutation types.

parameters.name: affinity.optimization.threshold
parameters.description: Fold change threshold for mutations that increase the affinity/score. Only SNVs with fold change above this threshold will be reported. By default, all SNVs will be reported.

parameters.name: affinity.reduction.threshold
parameters.description: Fold change threshold for mutations that decrease the affinity/score. Only SNVs with fold change below this threshold will be reported. By default, all SNVs will be reported.

parameters.name: secondary.affinity.information
parameters.description: Affinity dataset used to assign a value to each binding site.

parameters.name: secondary.affinity.files
parameters.description: Files referred to in the "secondary affinity information" file.

parameters.name: secondary.PWM.data
parameters.description: PWM dataset used to assign a value to each binding site.

parameters.name: secondary.PWM.minimum.score
parameters.description: PWM score required to predict a binding site.

parameters.name: secondary.minimum.binding.charge
parameters.description: The minimum change of affinity or PWM binding score required to classify an "increase" or "decrease".

parameters.name: primary.motif.input.file
parameters.description: File containing matrix data for primary motif database generation (JASPAR format). If provided, motif database will be generated first.

parameters.name: primary.motif.input.format
parameters.description: Specify whether primary motif database input file contains PFMs or PWMs. Required if motif input file is provided.

parameters.name: primary.motif.filter.keywords
parameters.description: File containing keywords to filter primary motifs during database generation.

parameters.name: primary.motif.use.pseudocounts
parameters.description: Whether to use pseudocounts when generating primary motif database.

parameters.name: primary.motif.background.frequencies
parameters.description: Background frequency for each nucleotide (comma-separated string in order of ATCG) in primary motif database generation.

parameters.name: primary.motif.output.name
parameters.description: Name of primary motif database output file. If not specified, temporary file will be created.

parameters.name: secondary.motif.input.file
parameters.description: File containing matrix data for secondary motif database generation (JASPAR format). If provided, motif database will be generated first.

parameters.name: secondary.motif.input.format
parameters.description: Specify whether secondary motif database input file contains PFMs or PWMs. Required if motif input file is provided.

parameters.name: secondary.motif.filter.keywords
parameters.description: File containing keywords to filter secondary motifs during database generation.

parameters.name: secondary.motif.use.pseudocounts
parameters.description: Whether to use pseudocounts when generating secondary motif database.

parameters.name: secondary.motif.background.frequencies
parameters.description: Background frequency for each nucleotide (comma-separated string in order of ATCG) in secondary motif database generation.

parameters.name: secondary.motif.output.name
parameters.description: Name of secondary motif database output file. If not specified, temporary file will be created.
